# scripts/fix_pending_tasks.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-12T10:00:12Z

## Purpose
Self-healing cron · fix all known pending tasks · Iter 48.

Per global agentic-quality-benchmarks policy + operator brief
'create plan for all pending task · cron and fix'.

Scans for repairable issues + auto-fixes them. Schedule: every 4h.

## Process
### Functions
- `_log(action, detail, ok)`: (no docstring)
- `check_ollama()`: Fix #1 · verify Ollama is reachable; if so · export env for downstream.
- `fix_coverage_below_95()`: Fix #2 · if coverage <95% re-run agentic_coverage_loop.
- `auto_close_stale_hitl(hours)`: Fix #3 · pending HITL invocations older than N hours · mark Cancelled.
- `regenerate_stale_catalogs(days)`: Fix #4 · catalogs older than N days · regenerate.
- `regenerate_stale_contracts(days)`: Fix #5 · Pydantic contracts older than N days · regen Zod.
- `main()`: (no docstring)
